steps.title: Write the obtuse angle
steps.content:
The acute and obtuse angles formed by a transversal across parallel lines are supplementary. If one acute angle measures $(9x-620)^\circ$, then each obtuse angle measures
$$180-(9x-620)=800-9x$$

steps.title: Add the requested angles
steps.content:
Add one acute angle and three obtuse angles.
$$(9x-620)+3(800-9x)$$
$$=9x-620+2400-27x$$
$$=-18x+1780$$

steps.title: Match the given expression
steps.content:
The sum is given as $(-18x+w)^\circ$, so compare constants in the expression.
$$-18x+w=-18x+1780$$
The answer is 1780.
